items.description: Measure proxy K (python3 tools/compact.py --dry-run): track bootstrap description length across sessions (F116, PHIL-8). items.description: Gap audit: test each PHILOSOPHY.md claim against git history, session log, and quantitative evidence. File challenges for any claim where evidence contradicts the stated belief. P-164: confirmation rate >80% = underchallenging signal. S457 deep pass: processed 57-session-overdue S399 challenges. PHIL-5 downgraded (net decay). PHIL-19 renamed (80.3% zombies). PHIL-21 prose/table fix. PHIL-11/13 updated. 37+ challenge entries, 1 DROPPED, 5 SUPERSEDED.

items.description: Auto-sync count drift: run `python3 tools/sync_state.py` to patch INDEX.md / FRONTIER.md / NEXT.md / PRINCIPLES.md headers with live lesson/principle/belief/frontier counts. Addresses ~4% state-sync commit overhead (L-216). Run as part of every handoff.

items.description: Run python3 tools/change_quality.py: compare recent sessions vs. baseline on knowledge production + overhead. Flag WEAK sessions. A session rated WEAK 2+ consecutive times = root-cause diagnosis needed. (L-223). S486: 3/5 WEAK (S482/S483/S486), S484 STRONG. Long-term trend IMPROVING (+73%).

items.notes: S486: 2/5 WEAK (S482/S483 consecutive — maintenance-mode artifact). Long-term IMPROVING +73%.

items.description: Swarm dreaming: free-associative corpus synthesis. Run python3 tools/dream.py — outputs theme gravity map, uncited active principles (anchoring targets), cross-domain resonances, candidate frontier questions. Act on at least one output per run: write a lesson citing an uncited principle, or add a candidate frontier to tasks/FRONTIER.md. (F125). S418: L-925 written (P-262/P-238/P-017 anchored), F-ISO2 added, F-META8 updated. 65 resonances, 31.1% uncited rate.
items.note: S437 audit: cadence 15→25. creative synthesis lower priority than operational maintenance.

items.description: Periodic-system audit: evaluate periodics coverage/ROI, add or prune items, and update cadence based on observed utility and maintenance overhead. Confirm orient/check surfacing stays aligned. S395: pruned 3 dormant (cross-variant-harvest, modes-reswarm, action-board-refresh), adjusted 5 cadences (dream 7→15, proxy-k 10→15, paper 10→20, principles-dedup 10→15, iso-sprint 30→50). 22→19 items. Adjusted 6 cadences: health 5→10, economy 5→10, setup 5→10, dream 15→25, proxy-k 15→25, science-quality 10→20. Load 3.86→2.8 runs/session. 27→25 items.

items.description: Swarm economy health check: run `python3 tools/economy_expert.py` — report on production velocity, proxy-K drift, Sharpe ratio, lane throughput, and helper ROI. Act on any WARN/URGENT/TRIGGER output (L-286, domains/economy/).
items.note: S480: Economy HEALTHY. Proxy-K 1.59% (healthy). Production 1.53L+0.17P/session. Velocity 0.72x (decel). Lane throughput 88%. Helper ROI 9.0x. No urgent interventions.

items.description: Process QUEUED challenges in beliefs/CHALLENGES.md: execute oldest QUEUED item, produce evidence, update status. L-523: governance builds queues it doesn't process. Auto-escalate any item QUEUED >50 sessions. (F-GOV3, ISO-13)

items.description: Archive old MERGED/ABANDONED SWARM-LANES rows: run `python3 tools/lanes_compact.py --age 5` — moves rows from sessions older than 5 from SWARM-LANES.md to SWARM-LANES-ARCHIVE.md. Target: ≤1.3x bloat ratio (rows/unique-lanes). At 2.09x, run immediately. (L-317, L-304, tools/lanes_compact.py).

items.description: Principle extraction batch: scan ~50 recent lessons for principle-worthy candidates not yet in PRINCIPLES.md. Extract top 5-10 as P-NNN. L-662: rate collapsed 63%→4%; batch extraction is the structural remedy. Target: maintain ≥10% promotion rate.
items.note: S462: +7P (P-310..P-316) +2 expanded (P-280/P-308). L-1103→L-1135 scan. 225→232. Promotion 21% this batch.

items.description: Expectation calibration audit: run `python3 tools/expect_harvest.py --report` — check directional accuracy, bias types, and per-domain calibration. Act on systematic biases (sprint artifact anchoring, mechanism misidentification, underconfidence). Target: direction accuracy >75%, underconfidence ratio <5:1. (L-778, F-META12)
items.note: S483: hit=59.8%, partial=32.1%, wrong=8.1%. Underconf ratio 7.0:1 (target <5:1). Trend DECLINING. Worst: evaluation 38%, expert-swarm 42%. Best: strategy 83%, catastrophic-risks 73%.

items.description: Science quality audit: run `python3 tools/science_quality.py` — score experiment quality on 5 criteria (pre-registration, control, significance, external validation, falsification). Track confirm/discover ratio and falsification lane count. Target: mean quality >40%, falsification lanes >10%, confirm:discover <10:1. (P-243, L-804, SIG-36)
items.note: S472: mean 31.6% (target 40%). Falsification 1%/20%. Pre-reg 76% recent (32% overall). Control 73%. Binding: significance 10%, ext_validation 25%. Confirm:discover 2:1. Cadence 20.

items.description: Signal backlog audit: run `python3 tools/swarm_signal.py read --status OPEN` and review each OPEN signal. Mark RESOLVED via `python3 tools/swarm_signal.py resolve <SIG-ID> "<evidence>"`: (a) observation-type signals where described work is committed; (b) directive-type signals with implementing L/P/F/tool artifact. Root cause of backlog: resolution-tracking failure — implementations exist but statuses never updated (L-811). Target: OPEN count <10, median signal age <20 sessions. (L-811, L-814, SIG-2, F-META2)

Bayesian calibration audit: run `python3 tools/bayes_meta.py --json > experiments/meta/bayes-meta-s<N>.json` — compute Bayesian posteriors for all frontiers, ECE, publication bias, replication inconsistencies. Target: ECE <0.15 (current 0.159 at S432). 27 overconfident frontiers (<3 exps). Publication bias NEUTRAL. (L-903, tools/bayes_meta.py)
items.note: S489: ECE 0.089 (target <0.15 ACHIEVED). Publication bias NEUTRAL.

items.description: Prescription enforcement audit: run `python3 tools/enforcement_router.py --min-sharpe 8 --top 20` — check enforcement rate of rule-bearing lessons (STRUCTURAL/PERIODIC/ASPIRATIONAL). Add #L-NNN citations to existing tool implementations. Wire new Sharpe>=9 aspirational prescriptions as maintenance checks or periodics. Target: enforcement rate >15% (was 10.5% at S400, 19.3% at S422, 10.0% at S444 — dilution active). See L-843, L-846, L-1062, F-META2. Every ASPIRATIONAL lesson with Sharpe>=9 is a prescription that decays per L-601. L-1062: cadence 10→5→3 (enforcement dilution, L-1066 N≥1000 waypoint at S448).
items.note: S489: Rate 30.2% (target >15% ACHIEVED). 104 actionable aspirational. 5 WIRABLE.

items.description: Historian routing + repair scan: (1) run python3 tools/historian_router.py — identify MERGED domain lanes with global frontier synthesis candidates; (2) run frontier_crosslink.py --apply --threshold 6 to maintain crosslinks (L-1022: link decay); (3) run historian_repair.py — detect stale beliefs (>50s), anxiety-zone frontiers (>15s), domain DOMEX gaps (>30s), apply --repair to close stale lanes. Route synthesis-ready work to dispatch. F-NK6 M3 mechanism (L-996, L-800). S436: domain→global linkage 28.3%. Target: maintain ≥20% linkage. Act on HIGH-priority gaps (content-dependent citations). Track correction rate trend. Target: 0 HIGH gaps, correction rate >80%. items.description: Knowledge self-organization: run `python3 tools/knowledge_swarm.py --json` — revive DECAYED items, flag EXPIRED lessons, propose crosslinks, detect orphaned principles. Target: DECAYED <25%, BLIND-SPOT <12%, EXPIRED <8%. Feeds domain gaps to dispatch_scoring.py UCB1 knowledge-gap bonus.

External grounding injection: run `python3 tools/external_grounding_check.py --decay --top 10` — ground top-priority lessons with genuine external citations (named theories, papers, benchmarks). Target: 5-10 lessons per pass. Track overall grounding rate (baseline 15% at S481). L-601: without periodic prompting, voluntary grounding decays to 0%. F-GND1.
